scripts.setup: ((npm --prefix saas ci) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas ci)) && ((npm --prefix saas run db:generate) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run db:generate)) && ((npm --prefix saas run db:validate) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run db:validate))
scripts.dev: (npm --prefix saas run dev) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run dev)
scripts.plan:check: (npm --prefix saas run plan:check) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run plan:check)
scripts.lint: (npm --prefix saas run lint) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run lint)
scripts.typecheck: (npm --prefix saas run typecheck) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run typecheck)
scripts.test:unit: (npm --prefix saas run test:unit) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run test:unit)
scripts.test:integration: (npm --prefix saas run test:integration) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run test:integration)
scripts.test:e2e: (npm --prefix saas run test:e2e) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run test:e2e)
scripts.verify: (npm --prefix saas run verify) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run verify)
scripts.release:check: (npm --prefix saas run release:check) || ("%npm_node_execpath%" "%npm_execpath%" --prefix saas run release:check)
